nasb.text: He said to her, “Stand in the doorway of the tent, and it shall be if anyone comes and inquires of you, and says, ‘Is there anyone here?’ that you shall say, ‘No.’ ”

esv.text: And he said to her, “Stand at the opening of the tent, and if any man comes and asks you, ‘Is anyone here?’ say, ‘No.’”

cnv.text: 西西拉又對雅億說：“請你站在帳棚門口，如果有人來問你：‘這裡有人嗎？’你就要回答：‘沒有。’”

ccb.text: 西西拉又说：“请你守着门口，倘若有人查问，你就说没人来过这里。”
